summary: Frontend E2E test of Araguaína inscription flow (edital 01) end-to-end. Verified: (a) finalizing inscription via BTN_Avancar creates the inscription in admin panel with status 'Aguardando pagamento' and valor R$160,00; (b) KPI 'Inscrições' incremented (=1); (c) navigation to minhas-inscricoes.html opens the correct page bound by protocolo; (d) 'Pagar inscrição' generates PIX (QR + copia-e-cola) and sets status 'PIX gerado'; (e) 'Copiar código PIX' → status 'PIX copiado'; (f) 'Baixar QR Code' → status 'PIX baixado'. Full status sequence validated via GET /api/admin/inscriptions?q=05898039058.
critical_code_review_comments: admin_routes.py is very large (>1000 lines): split into modules (auth, tracking, dashboard, cadastros, documents, pix, telegram) for maintainability.

In track_pix_generated/copied/downloaded (lines 419-540) there's ~120 lines of duplicated code (fetching inscricao, computing valor/nome/concurso, upserting). Extract into a helper e.g. _track_pix_event(collection, status, extra).

minhas-inscricoes.html Baixar QR anchor uses `data:image/png;base64,...` href — Chromium/Chrome may open the QR inline instead of emitting a native download event (worked in this test via download attribute but Playwright's download event never fired). Consider using Blob URL created via URL.createObjectURL for more reliable cross-browser downloads.
CSP is being violated on multiple pages by Cloudflare beacon script (console errors observed). Non-blocking for functionality but should be reviewed.
test_credentials: donas / Seinao10@@ (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). PIX config already present: pix_key=teste@araguaina.com.br, nome=PREFEITURA ARAGUAINA, cidade=ARAGUAINA.
seed_data_creation: One inscription created during the test for CPF 05898039058 (MARIA EDUARDA DANIEL MACHADO), cargo COD 01100, valor R$160, protocolo dynamic. Left in DB (finalized=true, pix_status=PIX baixado) so main agent can verify via admin panel; delete via DELETE /api/admin/inscriptions/{id} if cleanup is desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full inscription→PIX flow is functional in edital 01. Editais 02/03/04 share the same insc-modal-js block so should behave identically. If retesting: (1) clear via /api/admin/inscriptions/clear-all; (2) hit /inscricao-edital-0X.html with cpf/nome query, dispatch change on #CMB_Cargo after picking a value != -1, check #CHK_AceitoRequerimento, click #BTN_Avancar; (3) OK on modal navigates with protocolo; (4) Pagar → Copiar → Baixar. Verify GET /api/admin/inscriptions?q=<cpf>.
rca of the issue: N/A — original bug ('inscrição não era criada no painel') is FIXED. The current code posts /api/track/registration with stage=inscricao_finalizada from insc-modal-js before opening the modal, and admin_routes.py:track_registration handles finalized=True by upserting inscricoes with pix_status='Aguardando pagamento'. Status transitions are driven by _upsert_pix_status (cpf+protocolo → cpf+cargo_codigo fallback → most-recent-by-cpf fallback), which matched correctly in the test.
